projects.title: RomeAI - Campus Room Manager
projects.description: A comprehensive university classroom and session management system featuring a React Native mobile app and a Flask REST API.
features: Student Role: Dashboard, Schedules, Notifications, and Profile management.
Professor Role: Session management, Room availability tracking, and Attendance.
Admin Role: Campus statistics, User/Room management, and Exam scheduling.
Real-time sync between Mobile app and Flask backend.

projects.title: Optimal K-Clustering Methodology
projects.description: An advanced unsupervised clustering project determining the optimal number of clusters (K) using rigorous mathematical criteria.
features: Multi-perspective validation: Geometric, Statistical, and Probabilistic metrics.
Implemented Silhouette, Calinski-Harabasz, Davies-Bouldin, and BIC.
Consensus-based selection using a democratic voting mechanism.
Objectivity: Mathematical decision rules replacing subjective visual inspection.

projects.title: Oracle Database Intelligence System
projects.description: A database-centric 3-tier architecture for university management using PL/SQL logic and role-based dashboards.
features: Advanced PL/SQL Triggers and Stored Procedures for business logic enforcement.
Admin Dashboard: Statistics, Enrollment management, and Conflict-free scheduling.
Professor Dashboard: Grade submission and Attendance analytics.
Student Dashboard: Course registration and Personalized academic schedules.

projects.title: SIEM AI Dashboard
projects.description: Real-time Security Information and Event Management dashboard analyzing Wazuh alerts using Local LLMs.
features: Real-time Alert Processing: Ingests Wazuh alerts via Kafka.
AI-Powered Analysis: Local LLM (Ollama) classification of True vs False Positives.
Modern visualization dashboard for security statistics and live streams.
